name: python3-stix2
title: python3-stix2
summary: Python APIs for serializing and de-serializing STIX2 JSON content (Python 3)
description:
Python APIs for serializing and de-serializing STIX2 JSON content (Python 3)
This package contains Python APIs for serializing and de-serializing STIX2
JSON content, along with higher-level APIs for common tasks, including data
markings, versioning, and for resolving STIX IDs across multiple data sources.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-stix2 because Python APIs for serializing and de-serializing STIX2 JSON content (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-stix2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-stix2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-stix2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
